No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description links to hunger or food security.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (4.3), develops language skills for work (4.4), and fosters an international perspective (4.7), contributing to global citizenship.

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description links to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description links to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description links to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course aims to develop language skills for work and professional competitiveness, indirectly supporting students' future productive employment (Target 8.5).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description links to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description links to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Writing about 'Taiwanese culture' offers a minimal, inferred link to appreciating and safeguarding cultural heritage (Target 11.4).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description links to responsible consumption or production.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description links to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description links to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description links to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The explicit instruction to 'Respect Copyright' and '維護智慧財產權' directly supports the promotion of the rule of law (Target 16.3).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course aims to develop an 'international perspective' and 'international mobility,' foundational for global partnerships and knowledge sharing (Targets 17.6, 17.9).
